mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT rs.UUID_PCI as uuidPci, rs.UTILIZATION as utilization,rs.MEMORY_USE as memoryUse,rs.CODE_RATE as codeRate,rs.DECODE_RATE as decodeRate, rs.TIME as time, DOMAIN_ID as domainId FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT AS rs, (SELECT d.bus, d.uuid, d.cluster_id, d.host_id, d.host_name FROM ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_RES_POOL_DEVICE} AS d WHERE d.res_pool_id = ${resPoolId}) AS dev WHERE (((dev.uuid IS NOT NULL AND dev.uuid = rs.UUID_PCI) OR (lowerUTF8(dev.bus) = lowerUTF8(rs.UUID_PCI))) AND dev.cluster_id = rs.CLUSTER_ID AND dev.host_id = rs.HOST_ID) AND rs.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT UUID_PCI as uuidPci, UTILIZATION as utilization,MEMORY_USE as memoryUse,CODE_RATE as codeRate,DECODE_RATE as decodeRate,TIME as time FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT WHERE DOMAIN_ID =${domainId} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME)-${duration} FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT)

SELECT UUID_PCI as uuidPci, UTILIZATION as utilization, MEMORY_USE as memoryUse, CODE_RATE as codeRate, DECODE_RATE as decodeRateme, TIME as time, DOMAIN_ID as domainId, HOST_ID as hostId FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT WHERE DOMAIN_ID =${domainId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,ROUND(AVG(UTILIZATION),2) as utilization,ROUND(AVG(MEMORY_USE),2) as memoryUse,ROUND(AVG(CODE_RATE),2) as codeRate, ROUND(AVG(DECODE_RATE),2) as decodeRate,UUID_PCI as uuidPci FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT WHERE DOMAIN_ID=${domainId} AND TIME >= (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT) -${duration} GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID,UUID_PCI
